title: My account
subtitle: Personal info and account security
errorLoad: Could not load your account. Please try again.

toast.passwordChanged: Password changed. Other devices were signed out.
toast.error: Something went wrong. Try again later.

profile.title: Personal information
profile.managedByHr: Managed by HR — contact HR to change these.
profile.noEmployee: This account has no linked employee profile.
profile.avatarHint: Paste an image link; leave empty to use initials.

password.title: Change password
password.description: After changing, every other device is signed out.
password.ssoOnly: Your company requires SSO (Google) sign-in — this account does not use a password.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Devices currently signed in to your account
sessions.revokeConfirmBody: Every session except the current one will be revoked immediately.

google.title: Google sign-in
google.notLinked: Not linked yet. Sign in with Google once to link your account.

notifications.title: Email notifications
notifications.description: Email only — in-app notifications keep showing as usual.
notifications.probation_endingHint: Reminder emails when someone in your scope is about to finish probation.
notifications.contract_expiringHint: Reminder emails when a contract approaches its end date.
